data: {"generalSituation":"Upper-air disturbances will bring a few showers to southern China tomorrow. The easterly airstream now affecting the coast of Guangdong will be replaced by a southerly airstream in the next couple of days, the weather over Guangdong will be very hot early to midweek next week. Showers triggered by high temperatures will also affect the region. A broad trough of low pressure is expected to bring unsettled weather to the central part of the South China Sea midweek next week, and it will edge closer to the northern part of the South China Sea and the coast of southern China in the latter part of next week. Showers will increase gradually over the region. Besides, Tropical Cyclone Jangmi will intensify gradually in the next couple of days, and move towards the vicinity of the Ryukyu Islands.","weatherForecast":[{"forecastDate":"20260531","week":"Sunday","forecastWind":"East to southeast force 2 to 3.","forecastWeather":"Sunny periods and a few showers.","forecastMaxtemp":{"value":32,"unit":"C"},"forecastMintemp":{"value":27,"unit":"C"},"forecastMaxrh":{"value":95,"unit":"percent"},"forecastMinrh":{"value":65,"unit":"percent"},"ForecastIcon":53,"PSR":"Medium Low"},{"forecastDate":"20260601","week":"Monday","forecastWind":"South force 2 to 3.","forecastWeather":"Sunny periods.
